psychologyData.psychologyNotes: Entered with proper analysis and confirmation. Comfortable with the risk (0.88% of portfolio). Will monitor daily and adjust stop loss as the trade progresses to breakeven once in profit. No emotional pressure, following the swing trading plan. Accepting market volatility as part of swing trades. Plan is to hold for target at 2950 (first resistance) or exit if support breaks at 2825.
